funds_data.description: Under normal market conditions, the fund will invest in a combination of fixed-income securities, including, but not limited to: high yield securities; obligations issued or guaranteed by the U.S. government, its agencies or instrumentalities; mortgage-backed securities issued or guaranteed by the U.S. government or its agencies or instrumentalities.
